blended.narrative: Brundage Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
